tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 苕之華，芸其黃矣。心之憂矣，維其傷矣。 苕之華，其葉青青。知我如此，不如無生。 牂羊墳首，三星在罶。人可以食，鮮可以飽。

ch : ith al rio ei Mhe hic ar
ihe flowers of the bignonia are gone; There are only its leaves all-green. If I had known it would be thus with me,
had better not have been born.
The ewes have large heads; The Three stars are seen in the fish-trap. If some men can get enough to eat, Few can get their fill. rs del is wc flo of he
